duplicate_heuristic_leads.disposition: known local-limited bundle typing problem, not a blind merge
false duplicate pressure from under-specified public route id

key_findings: S shuttle records are distinct when route label/name includes 42 St Shuttle or Rockaway Park Shuttle.
route_rockaway-shuttle-167241 remains a review candidate for cautious Rockaway Shuttle handling.
Advisory identity-review route-base generation has a weaker parser than deterministic identity keys.
Route bundles should use payload.routes/list context instead of masquerading as one scalar route_id.
Local/limited bundle records should normalize to composite local_limited rather than local or limited_stop.
Q52/Q53 SBS, Utica/B46 SBS, and some predecessor/current SBS records have likely split-candidate contamination.
Several high-merge records are mostly healthy but need field filtering for borough arrays and route-list context.
Smallest high-confidence patch is deterministic identity/submission normalization plus focused tests.
Identity overrides should remain safety nets unless validate reports concrete duplicate pairs after rematerialization.

implemented.summary: Normalize local/limited, local and limited, and limited/local route-type surfaces to composite local_limited and use that composite as service_variant when preserved in source_route_type_phrase.

Treat route_m15-local-limited style targets as composite local_limited; reject limited-only payloads targeting them; reject combined service-variant identity fields; require named context for route_id S shuttle submissions.
Added one reviewed do-not-merge guard for route_m34-sbs versus route_m34a-sbs after materialization surfaced duplicate identity key route_m34-m34a.
Covered S shuttle identity keys, route bundle keys, local_limited materialization, local-limited target rejection, combined-variant rejection, and generic S shuttle rejection.

intentionally_unresolved: No identity override aliases were added in this pass.
No Q52/Q53, B46, Bx41, M60, B44, Bx12, or M34 denormalization/split aliases were changed.
The advisory identity-review route-base parser remains separate from deterministic route key generation.
route_rockaway-shuttle-167241 remains a candidate for future deterministic or reviewed handling.
